clues: Users are receiving 'Delivery Status Notification (Failure)' emails for messages they sent.
The failure notice states that the email was rejected by the recipient's mail server.
The error message includes '550 5.7.1 Relay access denied' or similar text.
The outgoing email server's IP address was recently changed due to an ISP migration.
The recipient's mail server uses an IP-based allowlist for accepting email from this organization.
